response.justification: While the candidate substantially exceeds experience requirements and demonstrates strong seniority, mentoring, cloud, and modern software practices, there is a critical mismatch with the role's core requirement: C++ development. The resume shows only 6 months of formal C++ experience from 2014-2015, with the past 5+ years dominated by TypeScript/Node.js. The position requires immediate C++ productivity in industrial automation contexts, and the resume shows no evidence of current C++ expertise, MQTT/industrial protocol knowledge, or IEC 62443 security standards experience.
strengths: Significantly exceeds experience requirement (17 years vs. 8-12) with demonstrated seniority in staff/lead roles across multiple companies
Strong mentoring and teaching background with organized workshops, code katas, and courses reflecting ability to guide technical teams
Proven expertise in event-driven architectures, cloud services (AWS CDK), and modern development practices (TDD, CI/CD, agile)
concerns: C++ experience is minimal (6 months at National Instruments in 2014-2015, 10+ years outdated) while most recent 5+ years focus on TypeScript/Node.js, misaligning with the C++ core requirement
No demonstrated background in industrial automation, IoT, or manufacturing domains; no mention of MQTT, Modbus TCP/IP, OPC UA, or IEC 61850 protocols
No evidence of Secure Development Lifecycle practices, IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity standards, or security-focused development background required for manufacturing environments
